@graph.name: Materials Cloud
@graph.description: Materials Cloud is an open science platform providing curated computational materials data and tools for reproducible research.

@graph.name: MC2D - Materials Cloud 2D Crystals Database
@graph.description: Curated set of computationally relaxed two-dimensional crystal structures derived from experimental and computational crystallographic databases.

@graph.name: MC2D - 2D Crystals Database
@graph.description: A curated database of computationally relaxed two-dimensional crystal structures based on raw data from experimental and computational sources.
